# Pull Request

## Description

Brief description of the changes made in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Test addition/update
- [ ] CI/CD improvement

## Changes Made

- [ ] Frontend changes
- [ ] Backend changes
- [ ] Documentation changes
- [ ] CI/CD changes

### Frontend Changes (if applicable)
- Component updates:
- New features:
- Bug fixes:

### Backend Changes (if applicable)
- API updates:
- Service changes:
- Bug fixes:

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Cross-browser testing completed (if frontend changes)

### Test Coverage
- Frontend: Run `npm test -- --coverage` in `/frontend`
- Backend: Run `npm test -- --coverage` in `/backend`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or GIFs showing the changes, especially for UI updates.

## Breaking Changes

If this PR contains breaking changes, describe them here and provide migration instructions.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
Fixes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know about this PR.
